description: Restore pre-censorship gentile terms where Christian censors replaced גוים/נכרים with עובדי כוכבים. Applied only when the censored phrase appears; does not alter legitimate idolatry-specific language.

rules.notes: Documented in Avodah Zarah across Vilna vs early witnesses; see Marvin, Hachi Garsinan; Waxman, Scribal Error.
Acronym introduced by censors; restore only in generic gentile references.
Disabled by default — some witnesses use נכרים, others גוים. Enable per-sugya when witness-specific patches are added.

sources.title: How to Check your Girsa using Hachi Garsinan
